case_title: VIDES, EDGARDO vs. HARDING, VICKY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIDES, EDGARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDING, VICKY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 133 - 29TH ST. #5, S.F. CA. 94110
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER GRANTED --2-- JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIDES, EDGARDO JUDGMENT OF JUL-09-1997 SET ASIDE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDING, VICKY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 133-29TH ST, #5, SF, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY UNTIL AUGUST 31, 1997.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIDES, EDGARDO JUDGMENT OF AUG-06-1997 SET ASIDE
